# Psalms 89

## Verses (52)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | My song will be of the mercies of the Lord for ever: with my mouth will I make his faith clear to all generations. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | For you have said, Mercy will be made strong for ever; my faith will be unchanging in the heavens. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | I have made an agreement with the man of my selection, I have made an oath to David my servant; | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | I will make your seed go on for ever, your kingdom will be strong through all generations. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | In heaven let them give praise for your wonders, O Lord; and your unchanging faith among the saints. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | For who is there in the heavens in comparison with the Lord? who is like the Lord among the sons of the gods? | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | God is greatly to be feared among the saints, and to be honoured over all those who are about him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | O Lord God of armies, who is strong like you, O Jah? and your unchanging faith is round about you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | You have rule over the sea in storm; when its waves are troubled, you make them calm. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Rahab was crushed by you like one wounded to death; with your strong arm you put to flight all your haters. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Yours are the heavens, and the earth is yours; you have made the world, and everything which is in it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | You have made the north and the south; Tabor and Hermon are sounding with joy at your name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Yours is an arm of power; strong is your hand and high your right hand. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | The seat of your kingdom is resting on righteousness and right judging: mercy and good faith come before your face. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Happy are the people who have knowledge of the holy cry: the light of your face, O Lord, will be shining on their way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | In your name will they have joy all the day: in your righteousness will they be lifted up. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | For you are the glory of their strength; in your pleasure will our horn be lifted up. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | For our breastplate is the Lord; and our king is the Holy One of Israel's. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Then your voice came to your holy one in a vision, saying, I have put the crown on a strong one, lifting up one taken from among the people. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | I have made discovery of David my servant; I have put my holy oil on his head. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | My hand will be his support; my arm will give him strength. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | The deceit of those who are against him will not overcome him; he will not be troubled by the sons of evil. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | I will have those who are against him broken before his face, and his haters will be crushed under my blows. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | But my faith and my mercy will be with him; and in my name will his horn be lifted up. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | I will put his hand in the sea, and his right hand in the rivers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | He will say to me, You are my father, my God, and the Rock of my salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | And I will make him the first of my sons, most high over the kings of the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | I will keep my mercy for him for ever; my agreement with him will not be changed. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | His seed will keep their place for ever; his kingdom will be eternal, like the heavens. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | If his children give up my law, and are not ruled by my decisions; | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | If my rules are broken, and my orders are not kept; | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | Then I will send punishment on them for their sin; my rod will be the reward of their evil-doing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | But I will not take away my mercy from him, and will not be false to my faith. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | I will be true to my agreement; the things which have gone out of my lips will not be changed. | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | I have made an oath once by my holy name, that I will not be false to David. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
| [36](BBE.md#v36) | His seed will not come to an end for ever; the seat of his kingdom will be like the sun before me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v36) · [KJV](KJV.md#v36) · [ASV](ASV.md#v36) |
| [37](BBE.md#v37) | It will be fixed for ever like the moon; and the witness in heaven is true. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v37) · [KJV](KJV.md#v37) · [ASV](ASV.md#v37) |
| [38](BBE.md#v38) | But you have put him away in disgust; you have been angry with the king of your selection. | [WEB](WEB.md#v38) · [KJV](KJV.md#v38) · [ASV](ASV.md#v38) |
| [39](BBE.md#v39) | You have made your agreement with your servant of no effect: you have had no respect for his crown, it has come down even to the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v39) · [KJV](KJV.md#v39) · [ASV](ASV.md#v39) |
| [40](BBE.md#v40) | All his walls are broken down; you have given his strong towers to destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v40) · [KJV](KJV.md#v40) · [ASV](ASV.md#v40) |
| [41](BBE.md#v41) | All those who come by take away his goods; he is laughed at by his neighbours. | [WEB](WEB.md#v41) · [KJV](KJV.md#v41) · [ASV](ASV.md#v41) |
| [42](BBE.md#v42) | You have given power to the right hand of his haters; you have made glad all those who are against him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v42) · [KJV](KJV.md#v42) · [ASV](ASV.md#v42) |
| [43](BBE.md#v43) | His sword is turned back; you have not been his support in the fight. | [WEB](WEB.md#v43) · [KJV](KJV.md#v43) · [ASV](ASV.md#v43) |
| [44](BBE.md#v44) | You have put an end to his glory: the seat of his kingdom has been levelled to the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v44) · [KJV](KJV.md#v44) · [ASV](ASV.md#v44) |
| [45](BBE.md#v45) | You have made him old before his time; he is covered with shame. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v45) · [KJV](KJV.md#v45) · [ASV](ASV.md#v45) |
| [46](BBE.md#v46) | How long, O Lord, will you Keep yourself for ever from our eyes? how long will your wrath be burning like fire? | [WEB](WEB.md#v46) · [KJV](KJV.md#v46) · [ASV](ASV.md#v46) |
| [47](BBE.md#v47) | See how short my time is; why have you made all men for no purpose? | [WEB](WEB.md#v47) · [KJV](KJV.md#v47) · [ASV](ASV.md#v47) |
| [48](BBE.md#v48) | What man now living will not see death? will he be able to keep back his soul from the underworld? (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v48) · [KJV](KJV.md#v48) · [ASV](ASV.md#v48) |
| [49](BBE.md#v49) | Lord, where are your earlier mercies? where is the oath which you made to David in unchanging faith? | [WEB](WEB.md#v49) · [KJV](KJV.md#v49) · [ASV](ASV.md#v49) |
| [50](BBE.md#v50) | Keep in mind, O Lord, the shame of your servants, and how the bitter words of all the people have come into my heart; | [WEB](WEB.md#v50) · [KJV](KJV.md#v50) · [ASV](ASV.md#v50) |
| [51](BBE.md#v51) | The bitter words of your haters, O Lord, shaming the footsteps of your king. | [WEB](WEB.md#v51) · [KJV](KJV.md#v51) · [ASV](ASV.md#v51) |
| [52](BBE.md#v52) | Let the Lord be praised for ever. So be it, So be it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v52) · [KJV](KJV.md#v52) · [ASV](ASV.md#v52) |
